description: A short, beginner-friendly explainer course on Claude. Each lesson builds intuition for one idea — what it is, why it exists, and when you'd use it — in plain language, sequenced so each concept builds on the last.

lessons.title: The Claude Family and When to Use Opus
Sonnet and Haiku: Choosing the Right Claude Model
Claude, the Anthropic API, and the Context Window
Tool Use: Letting Claude Reach Beyond Text
Claude Code and Model Context Protocol
